characters.name: Kaito
characters.look: short black hair, red bomber jacket, athletic teen

characters.name: Ren
characters.look: long silver hair, dark trench coat, calm expression

pages.layout: single panel per image, read right-to-left across the page

panels.subject: Kaito and Ren facing each other on a rooftop
panels.action: the two square off at sunset, wind whipping their clothes
panels.setting: Tokyo rooftop, dusk, city skyline behind

panels.subject: Kaito's face
panels.action: Kaito narrows his eyes and clenches a fist

panels.subject: Ren stepping forward
panels.action: Ren takes one slow step, coat flaring
